_meta.resume_note: The complete official 2025-2026 Programs of Study award inventory contains no general Economics AA-T, AS-T, AA, or AS.

none_found_sources.locator: Printed catalog pages 64-66, complete Programs of Study award table; no Economics associate degree is listed

notes: Los Medanos publishes Economics courses, but its complete 2025-2026 award table does not publish an Economics-titled associate degree. Business and Liberal Arts: Behavioral Science and Social Science awards are umbrella or adjacent awards and are outside this pass.
